posts.raw_content:
R E S E N T M E N T




1. Women resent their fathers for divorcing their mothers --> fight the patriarchy, low self esteem --> onlyfans



2. Men resent their fathers for divorcing their mothers --> the absence of a masculine figure --> turn gay (cf. the coffee-spitting hilarious reason given by Milo)



3. Africans obviously resent the colonizers for not colonizing them enough...'cos they are still living in a shit hole --> beat up westeners at every opportunity as revenge. 



4. Muslim world resents Christians because despite proclaiming Allah is the best 5 times a day, every morning when they open the windows they are faced with the shit hole they are living in...and they know it --> blow themselves up just in the hope of killing an infidel.



5. Ugly girls resent the fact that they aren't as beautiful as the girl next door --> trash their face with piercings and skin with ink scribbles and/or become lesbian.



6. Continents full of such ugly girls that they are forced by the men to cover up --> raping of goats/boys.



7. Jews resent Christians/Westeners whom they see as the successors of the Roman empire (Bibi's words not mine) --> lots of shit.



8. Assholes resenting that they have to go to work or make themselves useful to be successful and/or rich--> communism.



9. Climate freaks are resentful of clouds, rain, sunshine and everything they can't control --> they become control freaks.



10. Globalist are resentful that they don't control the world --> so they hate the people and try to destroy us at every turn.



11. People resentful of the fact they are boring fucks --> try to think of something --> decide chopping dick or tits off will solve everything.



12. Pedos are resentful they were abused as a kid--> turn into kid abusers


It's a resentment that their lives suck.



They need Jesus, and that is exactly what has been taken away from them over decades. They are lost and need a shepherd to guide them back to God.



Feel free to continue the list...


* that kids blame their fathers for the divorce is unfair, but let's face it, the wives that probably initiated the divorce will convince their kids that the father is to blame.
